description: Detects large objects (string, vector, map, etc.) passed by value in C++ -- pass by const reference instead. Simplified from Rust: flags all parameter_declaration nodes (info severity) without filtering by type name, reference/pointer check, or NOLINT suppression. Higher false-positive rate -- all parameters are flagged, not just large type parameters.

flag.message: Parameter passed by value -- verify this is not a large object (string, vector, map); consider const reference to avoid copying
